description.value: [Source: GB19] DETAIL This drug bonds to the language center of the brain, granting psychic confidence and an intuitive understanding of languages. Type injury (injected); Addiction minor, Fortitude DC 16; Price 260 gp Effect 2 hours; +2 alchemical bonus to Linguistics checks for 2 hours. During this time, gain comprehend languages and scare as spell-like abilities (CL 6th), each usable once. DAMAGE 1d3 Dexterity damage
